On the west lawn of 264 Howard Access: Private.
Lots of green, unripe future-apples in June but I don't know if they'll end up walnut-size or baseball-sized or how sweet or bitter they will be. Access: Public.
Many blueberry plants all along the trails here. Nothing ripe in June - I'm guessing August. Access: Public.
Many blueberries all over this section of the trail - Fox Run, link to Saugus River, etc. No fruit by mid-June; I expect August. Access: Public.

Blueberries noticed and accessible from the lake. Not sure how close the hiking trails on the west side of the lake come to these plants.

Update from three years later and in the right month: swam across the lake to get here and these were sooo good! Access

fantastic berries for dozens of feet. Gotta get in up to your knees to get the best ones, on both sides of the little clearing. Also, swim directly across the lake for more excellent berries. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
Saw these last season. There is sumac all along this section of the bike trail Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
